parts.text: You are a test agent. Your task is to respond with valid JSON matching the schema provided. When a field is optional or nullable please mark it as null..

{
  "string": "sample text",
  "stringMin": "hello",
  "stringMax": "world",
  "stringEmail": "test@example.com",
  "stringEmoji": "🚀",
  "stringUrl": "https://example.com",
  "stringUuid": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  "stringCuid": "c123456",
  "stringRegex": "test-1234",
  "number": 42,
  "numberGt": 4,
  "numberLt": 5,
  "numberGte": 1,
  "numberLte": 1,
  "numberMultipleOf": 4,
  "numberInt": 10,
  "exampleArray": [
    "sample"
  ],
  "arrayMin": [
    "example1",
    "example2"
  ],
  "arrayMax": [
    "one"
  ],
  "date": "2023-10-01T12:00:00Z",
  "dateAfter": "2024-06-01T12:00:00Z",
  "dateBefore": "2023-01-01T12:00:00Z",
  "actualData": "2023-10-01T12:00:00Z",
  "object": {
    "foo": "test",
    "bar": 123
  },
  "objectNested": {
    "user": {
      "name": "Alice",
      "age": 25
    }
  },
  "objectPassthrough": {
    }
  ,
  "objectLoose": {
    }
  ,
  "nullable": "null",
  "enum": "A",
  "nativeEnum": "B",
  "unionPrimitives": 42,
  "unionObjects": {
    "amount": 10,
    "inventoryItemName": "Widget"
  },
  "discriminatedUnion": {
    "kind": "circle",
    "r": 5
  },
  "literal": "the-only-allowed-value",
  "tuple": [
    "test string",
    100
  ],
  "default": "sample text that is the default value",
  "optional": "null"
}
Call the manySchemasTool tool with valid sample data.
